overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a white-haired warrior walking through a dark medieval village at night. The character moves from an open area with wooden and stone buildings into a narrow alleyway, eventually approaching other villagers in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village path between wooden farmhouse and stone tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the village dirt path toward the stone building ahead, passing wooden barrels on the right

entered.detail: dark wooden medieval house with sloped roof and overhanging eaves
tall stone building with timber framing and multiple stories visible ahead
unpaved dirt trail with patches of grass on the sides
group of wooden barrels stacked near the path edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open village path at night, flanked by a wooden farmhouse on the left and approaching a large stone tower building ahead. The environment is dimly lit with cool blue moonlight, and wooden barrels sit on the right side of the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley passage between stone and timber buildings

events.description: enters narrow alleyway between buildings, transitioning from open village path to enclosed passage
passes wooden cart with red canopy on the left side of the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the narrow passage between high stone walls, passing a wooden cart on the left

entered.detail: wooden market cart with red fabric canopy and enclosed sides
rough stone wall of the building forming the right side of the narrow alley

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed alleyway between medieval buildings, passing a wooden cart with a red canopy on the left. The stone walls rise on both sides restricting the view of the sky, creating a sheltered corridor with dim lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone alley exit approaching open village area with villagers

events.description: villagers become visible ahead at the alley exit, indicating approach to populated area

agents.ego_description: walking through the final section of the stone alley, approaching the exit where villagers are gathered ahead

notable_agents.action: group of villagers standing and walking in the open area beyond the alley exit

entered.detail: group of villagers in medieval clothing visible at the end of the alley
silhouetted trees visible beyond the alley exit against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the stone alley approaching the exit, where light increases and a group of villagers becomes visible in the distance. The narrow passage opens ahead to a more open area with trees visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit medieval village that transitions from an open path into a restrictive alleyway before opening up again. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail under cool blue moonlight, flanked by a wooden farmhouse and barrels as they approach a large stone tower. As the character moves forward, the environment shifts into a narrow enclosed alleyway where high stone walls restrict the view of the sky and the camera passes a wooden cart with a red canopy. The scene then progresses through this sheltered corridor, with the lighting gradually increasing as the passage nears its end. Finally, the narrow alley opens back into a wider area where trees are visible against the night sky and a group of villagers appears in the distance.
